reviews.review_title: i am a mod for this game
reviews.review_description: the game aint done yet stop complaining

Hello for everyone wanting to know what this game is like I'm duckyvr I'm a admin and a moderator this game is a amazing gtag fan game and there are tons of cosmetics and you start of with to s of shiny rocks. We have forest city old clouds and mountains and also of caves and og canyons. The most popular code is 1 but most people are in city publicz also I highly recommend this game for gorilla tag lovers. I hope you download it and have a great time😁😁😁

I started playing last night and got on to play today so was super excited because this game was very fun but as soon as I logged on kids were begging for moderator, I said “there’s no point in really being moderator because not very many people play the game” I didn’t know it would make one of the admins upset because I was truly trying to help. So he reported me and started saying very hurtful stuff. I truly believe this game would be better if the admins you decide would be for a reason . Thanks for your understanding. Gorilla admin: PeepVr Teal color. The owners are very nice and friendly I recommend playing it. Nvr mind I just got IP banned because Peep Vr was crying and admins were lying so my brother could get banned because he had badges. Just play regular gorilla tag. Funny

developer_response.body: sounds like you were doing something bad because they are chosen for a reason

reviews.review_description:
I met one of the owners he was super nice and friendly I totally recommend this game it’s super fun and the community is nice 👍. Hope you enjoy it as much as I do.🦍🦍🍌🍌. Plz unban me I did nothing wrong they wanted me banned BROWNIEE because I had finger painter and illustrater badge, I really enjoyed this game until all the moderators started reporting me because I asked once for moderator. Then later today all the admins where ganging on me and my brother because peepvr was mad, so he called his friends to get us banned and didn’t want to believe me and believed him because their his friends and he was mad. So I am not happy because you believe me and my brother, but then you banned us for no reason. I would like to be unbanned and get my badges back, and for peepvr to be happy. Plz read this and I’m sorry for everything.🦍🦍🍌🍌. My name is BobbyVR and I have finger painter and 
illustrator badge

developer_response.body: what was your name and what badges exactly
